creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm reviewing some of the PR's I have assigned.

* ports(7) mentions the The Porter's Handbook as a source to create a new port.

* SEE ALSO mentions portlint(1) and bsd.port.mk as additional source of information. I would add The Porter's Handbook here again as a source of information for developers. Patch attached.

* The fact that the ports information is spread among several sources is listed in the BUGS section :-)
